title: AFTER SCHOOL EMPOWERMENT PROGRAMS - 211info
text: GIRLS INC OF THE PACIFIC NORTHWEST AFTER SCHOOL EMPOWERMENT PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides school-based empowerment programs and assertiveness education, including: -Allies in Action: Uses an interactive, peer-centered approach to reduce competition and hostility among girls -Friendly PEERsuasion: Addresses drug abuse prevention as a peer issue, encouraging young people to model healthy behaviors -Operation SMART: Mobilizes community resources to support girls -Economic Literacy: Guides girls in making sound financial decisions and building economic stability. These programs help girls feel more confident and capable in school by fostering self-esteem, collaborative learning, and other key developmental assets. 4800 S Macadam Avenue Suite 309 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Girls ages 6-18. Girls must attend the program associated with their school; participating schools vary. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 230-0054 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 230-0054 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Trimet routes 35, 40. Parking and main building entrance accessed from South Landing Drive. Turn off S Macadam Avenue east, toward the river, on either S Hamilton Court or S Boundary Street and turn onto S Landing Court. One hour guest parking available in front of the building. Services: Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention Mentoring Programs Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GIRLS INC OF THE PACIFIC NORTHWEST
